label: Mold keyword
expectation: Should surface housing-condition decisions discussing mold, remediation, or habitability.

label: Ventilation keyword
expectation: Should surface ventilation or airflow defect decisions.

label: Harassment keyword
expectation: Should return tenant harassment decisions.

label: Buyout keyword
expectation: Should return buyout disputes or disclosure decisions.

label: Owner move in combo
expectation: Should return owner move-in eviction decisions even when phrasing varies.

label: Repair notice combo
expectation: Should return repair-request and notice-related decisions.

label: Rent reduction combo
expectation: Should return rent-reduction decisions driven by service or habitability issues.

label: Wrongful eviction combo
expectation: Should return wrongful eviction decisions and closely related eviction defect analysis.

label: Capital improvement combo
expectation: Should return capital-improvement passthrough decisions.

label: Hot water combo
expectation: Should return hot-water habitability decisions.

label: Sentence: mold repair
query: tenant reported mold and landlord failed to repair
expectation: Should still surface mold/habitability decisions without requiring an exact sentence match.

label: Sentence: owner move in occupancy
query: landlord served an owner move in notice but did not occupy the unit
expectation: Should find owner move-in decisions discussing occupancy follow-through.

label: Sentence: decrease services
query: rent was reduced because housing services decreased
expectation: Should retrieve decrease-in-services and rent-reduction decisions.

label: Sentence: harassment entries
query: tenant alleged harassment after repeated notices and entries
expectation: Should retrieve harassment decisions even with natural-language phrasing.

label: Sentence: wrongful eviction lockout
query: tenant was locked out and alleged wrongful eviction after complaining about repairs
expectation: Should retrieve wrongful-eviction decisions discussing lockouts or repair-linked retaliation.

label: Sentence: hot water failure
query: tenant reported no hot water and the landlord failed to restore service
expectation: Should retrieve hot-water habitability decisions with service-restoration analysis.

label: Sentence: rodent infestation
query: tenant reported a rodent infestation that the landlord failed to address
expectation: Should retrieve rodent or infestation decisions even when phrased naturally.

label: Filter + mold + G64
expectation: Should preserve mold recall under the G64 filter.

label: Filter + heat + G49
expectation: Should return lack-of-heat decisions under the G49 filter.

label: Filter + rodent + G76
expectation: Should preserve rodent-related recall under G76.

label: Filter + hot water + G52
expectation: Should preserve lack-of-hot-water recall under G52.

label: Filter + bed bug + G40.1
expectation: Should preserve bed-bug recall under G40.1.

label: Filter + owner move in + ordinance 37.9
expectation: Should preserve owner move-in recall inside the 37.9 ordinance slice.

label: Filter + harassment + ordinance 37.10B
expectation: Should preserve harassment recall inside the 37.10B ordinance slice.

label: Filter + rent reduction + Katayama + G27
expectation: Should keep judge-specific G27 rent-reduction decisions in the ranked set.

label: Filter + capital improvement + Lim + rules
expectation: Should preserve capital-improvement recall inside a real metadata intersection.
